_note: Medial long-s (ſ) per Loth 1866: single stroke. Hairline rise from baseline to ascender top, thick Schwellzug descent back through midband, continues BELOW baseline with a small descender flick — the stroke terminates in the descender zone, not at baseline. M6's connection engine has to draw a transition curve from this descender exit back up to the next letter's baseline-entry.
